subject: [PATCHv7 06/18] LoongArch/mm: Align vmemmap to maximal folio size

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series aims to align the vmemmap to the maximal folio size on LoongArch architecture, addressing a requirement for the HugeTLB vmemmap optimization (HVO). The change involves updating the alignment of struct pages in the head page to be naturally aligned with regard to the folio size.
